server/tests/test_bmp_codec.py :: test_decode_bmp_24bit_solid
def test_decode_bmp_24bit_solid() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(12, 10, 40, 80, 120)
    payload = bmp_bytes(raster)
    decoded = decode_bmp(payload)
    assert decoded.width == 12
    assert decoded.height == 10
    assert decoded.data[0:3] == bytes((40, 80, 120))

server/tests/test_bmp_codec.py :: test_decode_bmp_via_formats_helper
def test_decode_bmp_via_formats_helper() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(16, 12)
    payload = bmp_bytes(raster)
    decoded = decode_image(payload, "gradient.bmp")
    assert decoded.width == 16
    assert decoded.height == 12

server/tests/test_bmp_codec.py :: test_decode_bmp_32bit_roundtrip
def test_decode_bmp_32bit_roundtrip() -> None:
    from image_tool.raster import Raster

    data = bytearray(2 * 2 * 4)
    data[0:4] = bytes((255, 0, 0, 255))
    data[4:8] = bytes((0, 255, 0, 128))
    data[8:12] = bytes((0, 0, 255, 64))
    data[12:16] = bytes((255, 255, 0, 200))
    raster = Raster(2, 2, 4, data)
    payload = bmp_bytes(raster.to_rgb())
    decoded = decode_bmp(payload)
    assert decoded.width == 2
    assert decoded.height == 2
